name: c2pa-validator-web
description: Browser front-end for the c2pa-manifest-validator audit tool. Paste a TikTok or YouTube URL, upload an MP4 or sidecar claim, and get a regulator-grade C2PA + AI-disclosure compliance report with canonical status codes, signer DN, hard-binding hash + ingredient chain verdicts, and EU AI Act / SB-942 findings.
author: Blake Allan
